TokeniserState.java

1 
package org.jsoup.parser;
2
3 
import org.jsoup.nodes.DocumentType;
4
5 
import static org.jsoup.nodes.Document.OutputSettings.Syntax.xml;
6
7 
/**
8 
 * States and transition activations for the Tokeniser.
9 
 */
10 
enum TokeniserState {
11 
    Data {
12 
        // in data state, gather characters until a character reference or tag is found
13 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
14 
            switch (r.current()) {
15 
                case '&':
16 
                    t.advanceTransition(CharacterReferenceInData);
17 
                    break;
18 
                case '<':
19 
                    t.advanceTransition(TagOpen);
20 
                    break;
21 
                case nullChar:
22 
                    t.error(this); // NOT replacement character (oddly?)
23 
                    t.emit(r.consume());
24 
                    break;
25 
                case eof:
26 
                    t.emit(new Token.EOF());
27 
                    break;
28 
                default:
29 
                    String data = r.consumeData();
30 
                    t.emit(data);
31 
                    break;
32 
            }
33 
        }
34 
    },
35 
    CharacterReferenceInData {
36 
        // from & in data
37 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
38 
            readCharRef(t, Data);
39 
        }
40 
    },
41 
    Rcdata { // Rcdata has text with character references
42 
        /// handles data in title, textarea etc
43 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
44 
            switch (r.current()) {
45 
                case '&':
46 
                    t.advanceTransition(CharacterReferenceInRcdata);
47 
                    break;
48 
                case '<':
49 
                    t.advanceTransition(RcdataLessthanSign);
50 
                    break;
51 
                case nullChar:
52 
                    t.error(this);
53 
                    r.advance();
54 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
55 
                    break;
56 
                case eof:
57 
                    t.emit(new Token.EOF());
58 
                    break;
59 
                default:
60 
                    String data = r.consumeData();
61 
                    t.emit(data);
62 
                    break;
63 
            }
64 
        }
65 
    },
66 
    CharacterReferenceInRcdata {
67 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
68 
            readCharRef(t, Rcdata);
69 
        }
70 
    },
71 
    Rawtext {
72 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
73 
            readRawData(t, r, this, RawtextLessthanSign);
74 
        }
75 
    },
76 
    ScriptData {
77 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
78 
            readRawData(t, r, this, ScriptDataLessthanSign);
79 
        }
80 
    },
81 
    PLAINTEXT {
82 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
83 
            switch (r.current()) {
84 
                case nullChar:
85 
                    t.error(this);
86 
                    r.advance();
87 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
88 
                    break;
89 
                case eof:
90 
                    t.emit(new Token.EOF());
91 
                    break;
92 
                default:
93 
                    String data = r.consumeTo(nullChar);
94 
                    t.emit(data);
95 
                    break;
96 
            }
97 
        }
98 
    },
99 
    TagOpen {
100 
        // from < in data
101 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
102 
            switch (r.current()) {
103 
                case '!':
104 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(MarkupDeclarationOpen);
105 
                    break;
106 
                case '/':
107 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(EndTagOpen);
108 
                    break;
109 
                case '?':
110 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
                    if (t.syntax == xml) {
111 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                        t.advanceTransition(MarkupProcessingOpen);
112 
                    } else {
113 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createBogusCommentPending → SURVIVED
 
                        t.createBogusCommentPending();
114 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                        t.transition(BogusComment);
115 
                    }
116 
                    break;
117 
                default:
118 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
                    if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
119 
                        t.createTagPending(true);
120 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                        t.transition(TagName);
121 
                    } else {
122 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                        t.error(this);
123 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                        t.emit('<'); // char that got us here
124 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                        t.transition(Data);
125 
                    }
126 
                    break;
127 
            }
128 
        }
129 
    },
130 
    EndTagOpen {
131 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
132 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            if (r.isEmpty()) {
133 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → SURVIVED
 
                t.eofError(this);
134 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit("</");
135 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(Data);
136 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            } else if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
137 
                t.createTagPending(false);
138 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(TagName);
139 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            } else if (r.matches('>')) {
140 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                t.error(this);
141 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.advanceTransition(Data);
142 
            } else {
143 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                t.error(this);
144 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createBogusCommentPending → SURVIVED
 
                t.createBogusCommentPending();
145 
                t.commentPending.append('/'); // push the / back on that got us here
146 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(BogusComment);
147 
            }
148 
        }
149 
    },
150 
    TagName {
151 
        // from < or </ in data, will have start or end tag pending
152 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
153 
            // previous TagOpen state did NOT consume, will have a letter char in current
154 
            String tagName = r.consumeTagName();
155 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
            t.tagPending.appendTagName(tagName);
156
157 
            char c = r.consume();
158 
            switch (c) {
159 
                case '\t':
160 
                case '\n':
161 
                case '\r':
162 
                case '\f':
163 
                case ' ':
164 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(BeforeAttributeName);
165 
                    break;
166 
                case '/':
167 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(SelfClosingStartTag);
168 
                    break;
169 
                case '>':
170 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitTagPending → KILLED
 
                    t.emitTagPending();
171 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(Data);
172 
                    break;
173 
                case nullChar: // replacement
174 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.tagPending.appendTagName(replacementStr);
175 
                    break;
176 
                case eof: // should emit pending tag?
177 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → KILLED
 
                    t.eofError(this);
178 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.transition(Data);
179 
                    break;
180 
                default: // buffer underrun
181 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
                    t.tagPending.appendTagName(c);
182 
            }
183 
        }
184 
    },
185 
    RcdataLessthanSign {
186 
        // from < in rcdata
187 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
188 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            if (r.matches('/')) {
189 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createTempBuffer → KILLED
 
                t.createTempBuffer();
190 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.advanceTransition(RCDATAEndTagOpen);
191 4 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : negated conditional → KILLED
3. read : negated conditional → KILLED
4. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            } else if (r.readFully() && r.matchesAsciiAlpha() && t.appropriateEndTagName() != null &&  !r.containsIgnoreCase(t.appropriateEndTagSeq())) {
192 
                // diverge from spec: got a start tag, but there's no appropriate end tag (</title>), so rather than
193 
                // consuming to EOF; break out here
194 
                t.tagPending = t.createTagPending(false).name(t.appropriateEndTagName());
195 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitTagPending → KILLED
 
                t.emitTagPending();
196 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(TagOpen); // straight into TagOpen, as we came from < and looks like we're on a start tag
197 
            } else {
198 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit('<');
199 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(Rcdata);
200 
            }
201 
        }
202 
    },
203 
    RCDATAEndTagOpen {
204 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
205 
            if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
206 
                t.createTagPending(false);
207 
                t.tagPending.appendTagName(r.current());
208 
                t.dataBuffer.append(r.current());
209 
                t.advanceTransition(RCDATAEndTagName);
210 
            } else {
211 
                t.emit("</");
212 
                t.transition(Rcdata);
213 
            }
214 
        }
215 
    },
216 
    RCDATAEndTagName {
217 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
218 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
219 
                String name = r.consumeTagName();
220 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
                t.tagPending.appendTagName(name);
221 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokenData::append → KILLED
 
                t.dataBuffer.append(name);
222 
                return;
223 
            }
224
225 
            char c = r.consume();
226 
            switch (c) {
227 
                case '\t':
228 
                case '\n':
229 
                case '\r':
230 
                case '\f':
231 
                case ' ':
232 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
                    if (t.isAppropriateEndTagToken())
233 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → SURVIVED
 
                        t.transition(BeforeAttributeName);
234 
                    else
235 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → SURVIVED
 
                        anythingElse(t, r);
236 
                    break;
237 
                case '/':
238 1 1. read : negated conditional → SURVIVED
 
                    if (t.isAppropriateEndTagToken())
239 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                        t.transition(SelfClosingStartTag);
240 
                    else
241 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → SURVIVED
 
                        anythingElse(t, r);
242 
                    break;
243 
                case '>':
244 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
                    if (t.isAppropriateEndTagToken()) {
245 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitTagPending → KILLED
 
                        t.emitTagPending();
246 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                        t.transition(Data);
247 
                    }
248 
                    else
249 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → KILLED
 
                        anythingElse(t, r);
250 
                    break;
251 
                default:
252 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → TIMED_OUT
 
                    anythingElse(t, r);
253 
            }
254 
        }
255
256 
        private void anythingElse(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
257 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
            t.emit("</");
258 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
            t.emit(t.dataBuffer.value());
259 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::unconsume → KILLED
 
            r.unconsume();
260 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
            t.transition(Rcdata);
261 
        }
262 
    },
263 
    RawtextLessthanSign {
264 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
265 
            if (r.matches('/')) {
266 
                t.createTempBuffer();
267 
                t.advanceTransition(RawtextEndTagOpen);
268 
            } else {
269 
                t.emit('<');
270 
                t.transition(Rawtext);
271 
            }
272 
        }
273 
    },
274 
    RawtextEndTagOpen {
275 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
276 
            readEndTag(t, r, RawtextEndTagName, Rawtext);
277 
        }
278 
    },
279 
    RawtextEndTagName {
280 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
281 
            handleDataEndTag(t, r, Rawtext);
282 
        }
283 
    },
284 
    ScriptDataLessthanSign {
285 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
286 
            switch (r.consume()) {
287 
                case '/':
288 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createTempBuffer → SURVIVED
 
                    t.createTempBuffer();
289 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEndTagOpen);
290 
                    break;
291 
                case '!':
292 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit("<!");
293 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEscapeStart);
294 
                    break;
295 
                case eof:
296 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit('<');
297 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → SURVIVED
 
                    t.eofError(this);
298 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.transition(Data);
299 
                    break;
300 
                default:
301 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit('<');
302 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::unconsume → KILLED
 
                    r.unconsume();
303 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.transition(ScriptData);
304 
            }
305 
        }
306 
    },
307 
    ScriptDataEndTagOpen {
308 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
309 
            readEndTag(t, r, ScriptDataEndTagName, ScriptData);
310 
        }
311 
    },
312 
    ScriptDataEndTagName {
313 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
314 
            handleDataEndTag(t, r, ScriptData);
315 
        }
316 
    },
317 
    ScriptDataEscapeStart {
318 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
319 
            if (r.matches('-')) {
320 
                t.emit('-');
321 
                t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapeStartDash);
322 
            } else {
323 
                t.transition(ScriptData);
324 
            }
325 
        }
326 
    },
327 
    ScriptDataEscapeStartDash {
328 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
329 
            if (r.matches('-')) {
330 
                t.emit('-');
331 
                t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapedDashDash);
332 
            } else {
333 
                t.transition(ScriptData);
334 
            }
335 
        }
336 
    },
337 
    ScriptDataEscaped {
338 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
339 1 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            if (r.isEmpty()) {
340 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → NO_COVERAGE

341 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE

342

343 
            }
344
345 
            switch (r.current()) {
346 
                case '-':
347 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED

348 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapedDash);
349 
                    break;
350 
                case '<':
351 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT

352

353

354 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → NO_COVERAGE

356 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
357 
                    break;
358 
                default:
359 
                    String data = r.consumeToAny('-', '<', nullChar);
360 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(data);
361 
            }
362 
        }
363 
    },

    ScriptDataDoubleEscapedLessthanSign {
548 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
549 
            if (r.matches('/')) {
550 
                t.emit('/');
551 
                t.createTempBuffer();
552 
                t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataDoubleEscapeEnd);
553 
            } else {
554 
                t.transition(ScriptDataDoubleEscaped);
555 
            }
556 
        }

    BogusComment {
927 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {

    MarkupProcessingOpen { // From <? in syntax XML

969

            }
